title: Anna Karenina
author: Tolstoy, Leo, graf
summary: Anna Karenina opens with the domestic crisis in the Oblonsky household after Dolly discovers her husband Stepan Arkadyevitch’s affair with a former French governess. The revelation throws the family and servants into disorder: quarrels, resignations, and neglected children. Stiva, frank about his failings yet frivolous, regrets the involuntary smile that betrayed him and seeks reconciliation with Darya Alexandrovna. Household figures — Matvey, Matrona Philimonovna, a barber and others — react and attempt practical remedies. A telegram announces the imminent arrival of his sister Anna Arkadyevna, whose intervention promises hope for restoration amid social and emotional turmoil.

characters.name: Stepan Arkadyevitch Oblonsky (Stiva)
characters.personality: handsome, good-humored, frivolous, self-aware but not truly repentant
characters.lifespan: present in the house; marriage strained after affair; seeks reconciliation

characters.name: Darya Alexandrovna Oblonskaya (Dolly)
characters.personality: practical, devoted to household and children, emotionally hurt and indignant
characters.lifespan: refuses to see her husband; suffering and withdrawn in the household

characters.name: Anna Arkadyevna
characters.personality: presented as authoritative, socially skilled, potentially conciliatory
characters.lifespan: arrives to attempt to mediate and restore family order

characters.name: Matvey
characters.lifespan: remains employed and assists Stepan with daily routines

characters.name: Matrona Philimonovna
characters.personality: stern, pious, practical, protective of Dolly and the children
characters.lifespan: advises Stepan to beg forgiveness; remains influential in household

characters.name: Mlle. Roland
characters.personality: rougish, flirtatious (referred to by Stepan as attractive)
characters.lifespan: former governess involved in Stepan’s intrigue; left the household earlier

characters.name: English governess
characters.personality: practical, quarrelsome with housekeeper; seeking new situation
characters.lifespan: quarrelled with housekeeper and wrote to a friend asking for a new position

characters.name: Housekeeper
characters.personality: manages household staff, in conflict with English governess
characters.lifespan: active in household management amid disorder

characters.name: Man-cook
characters.lifespan: walked off, leaving the household short-staffed

characters.name: Coachman
characters.personality: staff member; left in the turmoil
characters.lifespan: gave notice along with other servants

characters.name: Barber
characters.lifespan: present and tending to Stepan’s grooming

characters.name: Alabin
characters.personality: social acquaintance used in Stepan’s dream/ recollection
characters.lifespan: mentioned in a remembered dream/dinner anecdote

characters.name: Merchant (buyer of forest)
characters.personality: businesslike; source of an unpleasant letter about property sale
characters.lifespan: seeks to buy a forest on Dolly’s property; complicates reconciliation

characters.name: Children (Oblonsky children)
characters.age: various; five living, two dead (as stated)
characters.personality: neglected and running wild during the quarrel
characters.lifespan: present and affected by parental discord
